ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing size. */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the clothing size (e.g., S, M, L, XL, 2XL). */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the size was added to the system. */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the size information was last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry. */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size associated with these measurements. */,
  "top_length" REAL /* Measurement of the top length. */,
  "bust" REAL /* Measurement of the bust size. */,
  "bottom_length" REAL /* Measurement of the bottom length. */,
  "waist" REAL /* Measurement of the waist size. */,
  "hip" REAL /* Measurement of the hip size. */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches). */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was added. */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region. */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., North America, Europe). */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code for the region. */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing standard entry. */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region for this sizing standard. */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size that is defined under this standard. */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the sizing standard. */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sizing standard. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_standards_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_standards_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_sizes" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record. */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement associated with this history. */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made. */,
  "old_value" REAL /* Old value of the measurement. */,
  "new_value" REAL /* New value of the measurement. */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change. */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change in measurement. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_sizes_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_sizes_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user. */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user. */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user. */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, designer, analyst). */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication. */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login. */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report. */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated. */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region related to the report. */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size related to the report. */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Text data containing aggregated report information. */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report. */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_reports_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference entry. */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region of the preferences. */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the preferred size. */,
  "demographic" TEXT /* Demographic descriptor (e.g., age group, gender). */,
  "preference_score" REAL /* Score representing the strength of the preference. */,
  "preference_source" TEXT /* Source of the preference data (e.g., survey, sales data). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_preferences_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_preferences_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_guidelines" (
  "guideline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guideline entry. */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection this guideline applies to. */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size discussed in the guideline. */,
  "guideline_text" TEXT /* Text of the guideline. */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the guideline becomes effective. */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date when the guideline expires. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guideline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_guidelines_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry. */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing the feedback. */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size related to the feedback. */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was given. */,
  "satisfaction_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user regarding size satisfaction (1-5). */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the user. */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product for which feedback is given. */,
  "response_required" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if a response to the feedback is required. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
